_note: Base style: top-level keys + ocean background. Per-domain layers live in helm-*-*.json fragments listed in manifest.json and merged by HelmShell.buildStyle() at load. The merged result is byte-equivalent to the legacy web/style.json. NEW layers added by an epic MUST be namespaced helm-<epic>-* (see web/SHELL.md); the legacy un-prefixed ids below are grandfathered because index.html + feature modules reference them by name.
name: Helm — tracer bullet
